name: Set up a Customer Rewards Points Program
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can configure a customer rewards points program to strengthen business customer relationships and encourage repeat purchases through incentivized loyalty benefits. This helps increase customer lifetime value and order frequency by providing redeemable points or credits for continued purchasing, with properly configured rewards programs typically improving customer retention and supporting business scalability through enhanced customer engagement."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing a rewards program enables B2B merchants to build lasting business relationships while differentiating their value proposition in competitive markets. This streamlines customer engagement by automating point accrual and redemption processes, providing visibility into customer purchasing patterns, and creating incentives that help drive repeat orders while improving wholesale customer experience and loyalty."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaCustomerRewardsPointsProgram1.05T5g00000gQGX1EAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaCustomerRewardsPointsProgram1.05T5g00000gQGX1EAO.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "User-added image"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}], "data-id": "this-add-on-was-built-by-maropost"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2Fask-us", "a", "url": "#recalculate", "children": [{"text": "Recalculate Rewards Points"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#5", "children": [{"text": "Remove Reward Points from an Account"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A rewards program gives your customers points on every purchase they make. Points can then be redeemed to offset the cost of future purchases. Once activated, the option "}, {"text": "Voucher & Rewards Programs", "bold": true}, {"text": " will appear under the "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu in the control panel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Customers cannot earn or redeem loyalty points in Maropost Commerce Point of Sale."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a customer is about to checkout with an order that will earn them reward points, they will be able to see the rewards on the checkout page. There will be a section titled 'Rewards Earned' that will indicate how many points or credits a customer will earn. Customers will only see this when they have logged in to their account, as guest purchasers cannot earn reward points."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your customers can receive an email letting them know that they have earned reward points. This email can be customised in your Maropost Commerce control panel. Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All settings & tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "System Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Email Templates", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "ID 24 - Reward Program Notifications", "bold": true}, {"text": ". The My Account page also shows points they have earned. These points will only appear if the customer has earned enough points to spend. This is controlled by the Minimum Redeem Amount on your Reward Program."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If a customer has earned enough points to use them, the rewards points will appear as account credit on their checkout page as an available payment option."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The customer will be able to choose how much credit to use against the purchase. An example would be that a customer can pay for half an order through credit and the remainder using a different payment method such as PayPal or Visa."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1VWMA1.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1VWMA1.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 12.52.12 pm.png", "width": 845, "height": 618}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reward points credit can be used across more than one purchase. On each purchase, your customers will decide how much credit they want to use for that purchase."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Rewards Program Add-on"}], "data-id": "set-up-the-rewards-program-add-on"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the rewards program add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel click the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the Marketing section find the Rewards Program add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Voucher/reward programs", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new voucher program", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now add your own rewards programs."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Select a Program Type and Name your Program"}], "data-id": "select-a-program-type-and-name-your-program"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will determine the type of reward or credit a customer receives when purchasing a related product."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Program Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "Reward/Loyalty Program", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Status", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Setting it to "}, {"text": "Inactive", "bold": true}, {"text": " will turn off the program."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you want to hide the rewards program on the front end of you site, select "}, {"text": "Hidden", "bold": true}, {"text": " for "}, {"text": "Visibility", "bold": true}, {"text": ", otherwise leave it as "}, {"text": "Visible", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Title", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the program. This is visible to your customers."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also enter a "}, {"text": "Subtitle", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This is visible to your customers but is not required."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set a "}, {"text": "Program Start", "bold": true}, {"text": " date. Customers will not be able to earn points or redeem points before this date."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set a "}, {"text": "Program End", "bold": true}, {"text": " date. Customers will not be able to earn points or redeem after this date. If you don't want the program to end, you can leave this blank."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1bbMAD.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1bbMAD.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 12.38.50 pm.png", "width": 1137, "height": 521}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set up Usage Rules"}], "data-id": "set-up-usage-rules"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here you can define the value of credit earned as well as program restrictions, start and end dates."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Redeem Code Prefix", "bold": true}, {"text": " will be applied to all system generated voucher/reward codes that get sent to your customer. This is necessary to track different discounts in use on your website."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Use points Instead of AUD", "bold": true}, {"text": " check box. If you'd prefer to give credit instead of points leave this box clear."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If selected, the field defines how many points must be spent to equal a dollar. For example, if you set it to 20 points equals $1.00 AUD, and your customer has earned 1000 points, and your customer will have $50.00 credit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can set when these points expire after the purchase date by entering the number of days in "}, {"text": "Vouchers / Points Expire", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This can be used to encourage customers to spend their points before they expire."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set a "}, {"text": "Program Earn Start", "bold": true}, {"text": " date. Customers will not be able to earn points before this date."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set a "}, {"text": "Program Earn End", "bold": true}, {"text": " date. Customers will not be able to earn points after this date. If you don't want the program to end, you can leave this blank."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can limit which Customer User Groups will be a part of the reward program. Under "}, {"text": "Available To User Group", "bold": true}, {"text": ", clear the groups that will be excluded from the program."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000V9puwMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000V9puwMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 12.42.09 pm.png", "width": 828, "height": 449}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the voucher rules set you can now set the usage rules, including how a customer earns points."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Select the Reward a Customer Earns"}], "data-id": "select-the-reward-a-customer-earns"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are two parts to the customer rewards, the rules and redemption limits."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Reward Earning Rules"}], "data-id": "reward-earning-rules"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Reward earning rules determine exactly how your customers will be earning their points and at what rate. To configure a reward rule:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on "}, {"text": "Add Reward Rule", "bold": true}, {"text": " to add earning rules. At least one rule is required."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can "}, {"text": "Include Shipping Cost In Calculation", "bold": true}, {"text": " if you would like to have the amount spent on shipping included on how a customer earns points."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Spend From", "bold": true}, {"text": " defines what minimum needs to be spent to start earning points."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Earn", "bold": true}, {"text": " defines how many points are earned for \"X\" dollars spent. Generally, the first box is used to give credit/points based on the initial spend amount. The second box lets you add additional credit/points for the entire spend."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, if you set the earn to "}, {"text": "1 AUD$ + 0.02 AUD$ per $ spent", "code": true}, {"text": ", and a customer spends $50.00, they will earn $2.00 credit (the initial $1.00 + (0.02 multiplied 50). If the customer instead spent $100.00, they would earn $3.00 in credit ($1.00 = (0.02 x 100)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Max Earn Amount", "bold": true}, {"text": " defines a maximum on how many points can be earned in one order."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Earn Start/End", "bold": true}, {"text": " once again can be defined to stipulate when those points can be earned."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also set which products this would apply to with the "}, {"text": "Applies to", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down. You can have it apply to all products, or only those that have had the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "#set-up-a-customer-rewards-points-program", "children": [{"text": "program applied through their product pages"}]}, {"text": ". You will find the setting in the "}, {"text": "Voucher/Reward Programs", "bold": true}, {"text": " section when editing the product details. You can create multiple earning rules each with their own settings:"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you add too many rules you can delete them by clicking on the red cross on the right. This will mark them to be deleted when you click the save button."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000V9x1rMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000V9x1rMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 12.45.02 pm.png", "width": 1030, "height": 526}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Redemption Limits"}], "data-id": "redemption-limits"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Redemption limits provide more restrictions on minimums, maximums, and being able to redeem in multiples (for example, can only be redeemed when $50 is spent, equalling 1000 points each time)."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Minimum Redeem Amount", "bold": true}, {"text": " - set a minimum dollar amount that can be redeemed at a time."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maximum Redeem Amount", "bold": true}, {"text": " - set a maximum dollar amount that can be redeemed at a time."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Can only be redeemed in multiples of", "bold": true}, {"text": " - set a dollar amount. If you enter 50, only multiples of $50 can be redeemed."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1nEMAT.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1nEMAT.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 1.05.40 pm.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Select a Design for your Reward Program Emails"}], "data-id": "select-a-design-for-your-reward-program-emails"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will determine what is emailed to your customers when they earn a reward."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1tLMAT.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000VA1tLMAT.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2025-02-07 at 12.47.00 pm.png", "width": 884, "height": 457}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Email Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " - select the email template that will be used. There is only one default but multiple templates can be created for different programs."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description", "bold": true}, {"text": " - enter the text that will appear in the email sent to customers."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Design for the rewards emails are an important customer facing final touch to your rewards program. There is a default template available as standard, or you can "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.neto.com.au%2Fservices%2Fdesigntweak.html", "children": [{"text": "get in touch with a design partner"}]}, {"text": " to create one that suits you."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaCustomerRewardsPointsProgram8.05T5g00000gQGZvEAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupaCustomerRewardsPointsProgram8.05T5g00000gQGZvEAO.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have finished, click the "}, {"text": "Add Program", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and your customers will be able to start earning points. They can also see how many they've accrued in the "}, {"text": "My Account", "bold": true}, {"text": " section of your website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Add Products to your Rewards Program"}], "data-id": "add-products-to-your-rewards-program"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A rewards program that only applies to specifics products needs to be assigned to your products. There's two ways to apply rewards, individually to each product, or through the product import wizard:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Rewards should only be applied to child and regular products. Kit and variation products with rewards will have no effect."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Add Rewards to Individual Products"}], "data-id": "add-rewards-to-individual-products"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add the rewards program to an individual product:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the product you want to add the rewards program."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the Voucher/Reward Programs section, select the reward program you added from the drop down menu, and click the "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you don't see this section, click the "}, {"text": "Customise layout", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page to make it visible."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. Repeat these steps for any other products."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The product will now allow customers to earn rewards points when they purchase."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Add Rewards to Product via Data Import"}], "data-id": "add-rewards-to-product-via-data-import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Follow the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/product-import-wizard", "children": [{"text": "Product Import Wizard"}]}, {"text": " steps to add rewards to products. Your file will need at least two fields:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Voucher / Reward Points"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Voucher/Reward Points field requires data to be in a
